summary: Outstanding audience recording of a fun 1985 show with a smoking Scarlet Begonias > Touch of Grey sequence.
review: The tape captures an exuberant 1985 performance in an intimate venue, highlighted by a scorching Scarlet Begonias → Touch of Grey stretch that sent the crowd into a frenzy.  The audience‑sourced recording is remarkably clear with just enough crowd ambience to convey the vibe without drowning out the band.  Overall the show and its capture are consistently praised as superb.

ai_rating.rationale: All three detailed reviews rate the show 4‑5 stars, praising both performance energy and recording clarity; the consensus points to an excellent audience tape of a top‑notch show.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Minimal audience bleed, well‑balanced instrument levels, crisp and clear for an AUD source; no reported dropouts or muffiness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: High‑energy set in a small, well‑appointed venue; the band rides an enthusiastic crowd with tight transitions and a particularly fiery Scarlet > Touch segment.
